response:
<<The Unbroken Spirit of Meera>>

Meera stands in the narrow lane of her Mumbai home where the sun warms the dust. She holds a book close to her chest while neighbors gather around to listen to her read. The community sees her bright mind and offers tools to help her build a future. A teacher arrives with new lessons and a promise of education for every child. Meera speaks of her dreams to become an engineer who will design better homes for everyone. Her family cheers as she studies under the streetlamp at night. The story shows how hope grows even in the toughest places when people support one another. No one tells her she cannot succeed because the entire neighborhood believes in her potential.
